title: Lamb Koftas with Greek Feta
description: A twist on traditional Mexican street food, these lamb koftas are infused with Greek flavors and topped with creamy feta cheese.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, combine the ground lamb, Greek yogurt, oregano, garlic, salt, and pepper. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Thread the lamb mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the koftas for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and lightly charred.
Transfer the koftas to a plate and top each one with a dollop of Greek yogurt and a sprinkle of crumbled feta cheese.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice, and serve immediately.
